title: aira tenorei subsp. intermedia
intro: Aira tenorei subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate bent grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aira tenorei subsp. intermedia include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various herbal preparations that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
